title: helia oerstedii
intro: Helia oerstedii, also known as the Mountain Rose or Rosa de la Montaña, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Helianthus genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helia oerstedii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and aiding in the recovery from illnesses. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
